name: investing-toolkit
description: Three-layer investing research toolkit — data, analysis, report skills.

interface.shortDescription: Three-layer equity research: market data, valuation analysis, and reports
interface.longDescription: Run end-to-end investing research across a data layer (US/JP/KR/TW/CN market fetchers), an analysis layer (DCF, comps, screener, technical, macro-regime, portfolio), and a report layer (equity memo, portfolio review, screener list, stock snapshot). Primary-source-anchored with gate enforcement; using-investing-toolkit routes the 16 skills.
defaultPrompt: Write an equity research memo for this stock.
Run a DCF valuation on this company.
Screen for undervalued stocks in this market.
